label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The problem says today is 9/7 (which would be September 7th) and Jane is watching NFL 2003. The question is asking for the date a month ago in MM/DD/YYYY format. The options are given as (A) to (F). First, I need to figure out what the date would be exactly one month prior to September 7th, 2003. Let's start by understanding what "a month ago" means in this context. Generally, when someone says "a month ago" from a specific date, we subtract one month from that date. So starting from September 7, 2003, subtracting one month would take us to August 7, 2003. That seems straightforward, but I need to check if any of the options match August 7, 2003. Looking at the options, option (F) is 08/07/2003. That matches exactly. However, I need to check if this is correct, and also check if any of the other options might be a trick or if there's something else I'm missing. Let me verify the calendar to ensure there's no confusion. August has 31 days, September has 30 days. If I subtract one month from September 7, 2003, it would definitely be August 7, 2003. The NFL 2003 part is probably just context and not relevant to the calculation. So the answer should be 08/07/2003, which
